case_title: HALL, AL VS ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY C/O MICHAEL M SULLIVAN

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL SULLIVAN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, AL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY C/O MICHAEL M SULLIVAN $2,715.33 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,735.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-16-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
